# PERF-222 positive: generic function in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-222-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Row struct {
	Value int
}

func formatElem[T any](v T) int {
	return 1
}

func Render(rows []Row) int {
	total := 0
	for _, row := range rows {
		total += formatElem[Row](row)
	}
	return total
}
